_publications._publicationTitle: Revisiting the NPcis mouse model: A new tool to model plexiform neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: 17% (4 out of 24) sciatic nerves progress into plexiform neurofibroma while none (0 out of 8) of the wild-type sciatic nerves do so
details: 17% (4 out of 24) sciatic nerves progress into plexiform neurofibroma after intentional nerve injury
